about.education: 4th Year BSBA Marketing at the University of the Philippines Visayas
about.description: Gill balances discipline with spontaneity. She values structure, responsibility and integrity while also enjoying spontaneous trips, playing WMMT6RR, and watching vlogs. She is a proud McLaren Formula 1 supporter fascinated by strategy, data, and branding behind high performance teams.
